headline: Old Dominion Upgraded to Equal Weight by Wells Fargo as Freight Recovery Shows Resilience
summary: Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) stock just caught a meaningful vote of confidence from Wall Street. Wells Fargo upgraded Old Dominion from Underweight to Equal Weight, raising its price target to $200 from $165, ahead of the company’s Q1 report. The firm’s core argument: the freight recovery looks more durable than previously expected. Wells Fargo ... Old Dominion Upgraded to Equal Weight by Wells Fargo as Freight Recovery Shows Resilience

headline: Wells Fargo Upgrades Old Dominion Freight Line to Equal-Weight, Raises Price Target to $200
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Christian Wetherbee   upgrades Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) from Underweight to Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $165 to $200.
